findings.description: `ValidationUtil` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the source code examples (called as `ValidationUtil.validate(context, UPDATE_PARAMS)` in both User class examples and `ValidationUtil.validate(context, new String[] { "dateValue", "bdValue"})` in ChildEntity), but is not listed in s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines: `ValidationUtil.validate(context, UPDATE_PARAMS);` appears in User.validateForUpdate and ChildEntity.validateForSample methods
